title: Approved Expired Source Reconcile Gate Waiver Apply Drift
description: Temporarily accept the demo apply drift for the expired source-reconcile gate waiver while reviewers validate the apply restore workflow without weakening the strict release-oriented apply gate.

approval.reason: The smoke workflow intentionally leaves the expired source-reconcile gate waiver apply target drifted after write so maintainers can exercise the apply-gate recovery flow without downgrading the strict release gate for every run.
